test_scenarios: ["Attempt brute-force attacks on login endpoint to verify rate limiting (5 failed attempts -> lockout)","Test MFA bypass by manipulating API requests after primary authentication","Verify JWT token expiration and revocation upon logout","Attempt to use a refresh token after user password change or session revocation","Verify session timeout warning appears at configured interval and forces logout"]
acceptance_criteria: Zero bypass of MFA allowed; Rate limiting blocks automated attacks; Tokens invalidated immediately on logout.
reporting_requirements: Auth vulnerability report attached to release notes
trend_analysis: Track frequency of brute-force attempts in logs

test_scenarios: ["Vendor attempting to access Admin-only endpoints (e.g., /admin/users)","Vendor A attempting to view/edit Vendor B's profile via ID manipulation (BOLA)","Client attempting to view proposals for projects they do not own","Admin attempting to self-approve a financial transaction where separation of duties is required"]
acceptance_criteria: API returns 403 Forbidden for all cross-role and cross-tenant resource access attempts.
reporting_requirements: Matrix of role permissions vs actual API access results
trend_analysis: Monitor 403 error rates by user role

test_scenarios: ["Upload malware-infected PDF/DOCX to test virus scanning integration","Attempt path traversal via filename manipulation (e.g., '../../etc/passwd')","Upload 'polyglot' files (e.g., image containing executable code) to bypass type validation","Test Denial of Service (DoS) by uploading massive files (>100MB) or zip bombs","Verify S3 bucket permissions prevent public access to uploaded SOWs"]
acceptance_criteria: Malware rejected; Files restricted to whitelisted types/size; S3 objects private by default.
reporting_requirements: Scan report for file handling microservice

test_scenarios: ["Send fake Stripe webhook events with invalid signatures to verify rejection","Replay a valid past webhook event to test idempotency and prevent duplicate ledger entries","Attempt to initiate a payout for a project without 'funds_in_escrow' status","Test race conditions on payout approval (double-click submit)","Verify no raw credit card data is logged or stored in the database"]
acceptance_criteria: 100% Signature verification for webhooks; Idempotency prevents duplicate transactions; No PAN data stored.
reporting_requirements: Audit log of all failed signature verifications

test_scenarios: ["Upload SOW containing known PII patterns (SSN, Email, Phone) and verify redacted output","Check vector database embeddings for residual PII leakage","Verify 'Right to be Forgotten' execution (GDPR erasure) removes data from all tables and logs","Test prompt injection on AI ingestion service to alter extraction logic"]
acceptance_criteria: Sanitized documents contain no PII; Erasure requests complete within SLA; Logs free of PII.
trend_analysis: Accuracy rate of PII redaction model

test_scenarios: ["Upload CSV with Formula Injection/CSV Injection payloads (e.g., '=cmd|' / DDE)","Upload CSV with SQL injection payloads in text fields","Test memory exhaustion by uploading CSV with millions of columns/rows"]
acceptance_criteria: Formulas sanitized/escaped upon import; SQL injection neutralized; Processing limits enforced.
